200.reason: [The variable 'lastc' is initialized to '*' before the loop but is never updated inside the loop. It must be updated to the current character at the end of each iteration to correctly detect the '*/' sequence. As written, any single '/' character inside the comment will prematurely trigger the break condition.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The variable 'lastc' is initialized to '*' before the loop but is never updated inside the loop. It must be updated to the current character at the end of each iteration to correctly detect the '*/' sequence. As written, any single '/' character inside the comment will prematurely trigger the break condition.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The variable 'lastc' is initialized before the loop but never updated inside it. This causes the condition to trigger on the first '/' encountered in the comment rather than correctly detecting the '*/' sequence.
